title: Camera Property, SPELVideo Control
description:
Sets/gets which camera to display video from.

Visual Basic

[form.]SPELVideo.Camera[ = integer ]

Visual C++

short pSPELVideo->
			GetCamera(void)

void pSPELVideo->
			SetCamera(short newValue)

Settings

Valid values are 0 to the maximum number of cameras. A value of 0 specifies that any camera will be displayed.
notes:
Use the Camera property when you want to display video for jogging or general display. If the SPELVideo control is connected with a SPELCom control, then the video displayed will be for the camera defined in the sequence that is run from the SPELCom control.

Data Type

Integer
